objective: TEMPLATE — copy to mvp-1.json (gitignored) and edit; `/project-setup` generates real mvp-*.json files for you. The tasks below are realistic examples of the expected granularity: outcome + probable files + non-obvious constraint, never a vague verb alone.

openQuestions.question: Free-tier limit: how many tags may a free user create?
openQuestions.why: The limit gates the upgrade prompt; tasks s1-g1-t1/t2 enforce and test it.

openQuestions.question: Empty dashboard: show a sample-data illustration or a plain 'create your first item' card?
openQuestions.why: Screen-level choice; either works, but it sets the tone for all empty states.
openQuestions.default: plain card, per DESIGN.md quiet-surface rule

goals.title: Users can tag items and filter by tag

tasks.desc: Add `tags` + `item_tags` tables in a new migration with owner-scoped RLS (mirror the `items` policies), regenerate database.types.ts, and add a zod schema `createTagSchema` in packages/core (name 1-30 chars, trimmed, per-user unique).

verify.desc: createTagSchema accepts valid names, rejects empty/31-char/whitespace-only, and normalizes case for the uniqueness key.

tasks.desc: Tag picker on /items: server actions in items/_actions.ts (createTag, assignTag — zod-validated, owner-checked), free-tier tag limit enforced with the upgrade prompt on exceed. Follows the chip component in the design plan.

verify.desc: User creates a tag, assigns it, filters by it; exceeding the free limit shows the upgrade prompt; empty state renders when no tags exist; picker is keyboard-navigable.

tasks.desc: Confirm the tag filter feels responsive on a seeded account (~50 items) — no visible lag when toggling tags on mid-range hardware.

verify.desc: Human toggles tag filters on the seeded account and confirms the list updates without perceptible delay or layout shift.
